recommendations:
Nanette Gibb

Sarah and I were colleagues within the Hearst group during a period of unprecedented pressure and challenge on traditonal ways of doing things and on delivering profitable revenues. What you see is what you get with Sarah - drive, commitment, professionalism, commercial focus, passion, humour, common sense, strong values and integrity and a huge amount of valuable industry knowledge and experience.

Darren Wray

I worked with Sarah for three years, and found her to be a very hard working with a length and breadth of experience of the print and publishing sector that is very impressive, this combined with her networking skills makes her powerful force in the publishing sector.Sarah is a very well organised, and detail orientated person, this helps her understand processes from different disciplines identifying the advantages to her organisation or clients quickly and efficiently.As a senior executive I found Sarah to be focused, driven and personable. In her dealings with clients Sarah brought her business acumen, knowledge of the sector, and sense of humour to form strong client relationships.I wish Sarah every success in her future career, which I have no doubt will continue to go from strength to strength.
